testimonials.name: General Manager Lin
testimonials.quote: What surprised us most about C.J. is that he didn't just teach us to use AI — he first helped us clarify 'why we should use it.' Three months after implementation, our defect rate dropped 40%. We couldn't achieve that in the previous three years.

testimonials.name: CHRO Wang
testimonials.quote: We used to treat AI as an IT department thing. C.J. speaks HR's language and designed a complete talent transformation framework for us. Now every manager uses AI tools for daily decisions.

testimonials.name: COO Chen
testimonials.quote: ESG used to feel like 'another essay competition' to us. C.J. started us with carbon inventory and turned abstract sustainability into actionable plans. We passed the supply-chain audit on the first try.

testimonials.name: Chairman Huang
testimonials.quote: In our traditional industry where 'the boss's word is law,' what we needed most was someone to walk alongside us. C.J. doesn't come to sell slides — he's a true consulting partner who stands with us to solve problems.
